channel.title: Frontion News - Geopolitical Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news and analysis from Tier 1 sources worldwide

item.title: 🇨🇺 US indicts former Cuban leader Raúl Castro over 1996 plane shootdown
item.description: The US Justice Department charged Castro with murder and conspiracy for ordering the downing of two civilian planes operated by Miami-based exile group Brothers to the Rescue, killing four people including three Americans. The indictment marks a sharp escalation in US pressure on Cuba's communist government.

item.title: ✈️ US military surveillance flights track movements near Cuba amid tensions
item.description: BBC Verify analysis shows US Navy P-8A Poseidon jets and MQ-4C Triton drones have been operating near Cuba since May 11, with some flights coming within 50 miles of the island. The public nature of the flights signals US intent to enforce the oil blockade and pressure Havana.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russian jets dangerously intercept British spy plane over Black Sea
item.description: The UK Defence Ministry said two Russian Su-35 and Su-27 aircraft repeatedly intercepted an unarmed RAF Rivet Joint surveillance aircraft in international airspace in April, coming within six metres of the plane. Britain called it the most dangerous Russian action against a UK aircraft since 2022.

item.title: 📈 Iran reopens stock market after three-month war closure
item.description: Tehran Stock Exchange resumed trading with restrictions after being shut since February. About 36% of companies remain suspended due to war damage, while inflation exceeds 70% and the rial continues to slide against the dollar.

item.title: 🏛️ Senate advances bill to end Iran war as GOP senator flips
item.description: A 50-47 procedural vote brought Congress closer to forcing President Trump to withdraw from the Iran conflict, with Republican Senator Bill Cassidy joining Democrats after his primary loss. The House will vote on a similar war powers resolution Wednesday.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 Trump Says Iran Talks on Borderline as Tehran Reviews US Proposal
item.description: US President Donald Trump said negotiations with Iran are on the borderline between a deal and further military action, suggesting Washington could wait a few days for the right answer from Tehran.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK cancels planned motor fuel tax rise, Prime Minister Starmer says
item.description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer announced the cancellation of a planned increase in motor fuel tax, reversing course amid economic pressures and public concern over living costs.

item.title: 🇨🇿 US doctor with Ebola exposure hospitalized in Czech Republic
item.description: A US doctor who had contact with an Ebola patient is being hospitalized in the Czech Republic as a precautionary measure amid the ongoing Ebola outbreak in Congo.

item.title: 🏥 US missionary with Ebola in stable condition in German hospital
item.description: A US missionary who contracted Ebola is in stable condition at a German hospital, according to the CDC, as health officials monitor the spread of the rare Bundibugyo virus strain in Congo.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iranian public receives basic gun training amid Trump threats to restart war
item.description: As tensions with the US remain high, Iranian civilians are undergoing basic firearms training as the country prepares for potential renewed conflict with Washington.

item.title: 🇬🇱 US envoy says America needs to put its footprint back on Greenland
item.description: A US envoy told AFP that Washington needs to reassert its presence in Greenland, highlighting continued American interest in the strategically important Arctic territory.

item.title: 🇱🇧 South Lebanon cultural heritage going up in smoke amid ongoing conflict
item.description: Cultural heritage sites in southern Lebanon are being destroyed as the conflict between Israel and Hezbollah continues, with heritage advocates warning of irreversible losses.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran consolidating control over Hormuz with island checkpoints and diplomatic deals
item.description: Reuters reports Iran is strengthening its grip on the strategic Strait of Hormuz through new checkpoints on islands and diplomatic agreements with regional partners.

item.title: 🦠 Ebola fears surge in Congo as rare strain spreads rapidly
item.description: The New York Times reports on growing concerns about the Bundibugyo Ebola strain spreading in Congo, with cases rising and health officials scrambling to contain the outbreak.

item.title: 🇱🇹 Lithuania's Vilnius airport suspends flights due to drone warning
item.description: Vilnius airport in Lithuania suspended flights following a drone warning, highlighting ongoing security concerns in the Baltic region amid the Ukraine war.

item.title: 💷 Bank of England has time to gauge impact of Iran war, Bailey says
item.description: Bank of England Governor Andrew Bailey said the central bank has time to assess the economic impact of the Iran conflict before making monetary policy decisions.

item.title: 🛢️ Saudi Arabia March crude exports drop to record low
item.description: Saudi Arabia's crude exports in March fell to their lowest level on record according to JODI data, reflecting production cuts and shifting global energy dynamics.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇷🇺 Putin and Xi hail friendship and growing energy trade at Beijing meeting
item.description: Russian President Vladimir Putin and Chinese leader Xi Jinping met in Beijing, showcasing their partnership and expanding energy trade as both leaders face pressure from the West.

item.title: 🦠 Ebola outbreak in Congo spreads as WHO warns of rising death toll
item.description: AP News reports on the rapidly spreading Bundibugyo Ebola outbreak in Congo, with WHO warning of 139 suspected deaths and 600 cases as vaccination efforts face challenges.

item.title: 🇦🇹 Austrian ex-intelligence officer found guilty of Russia spying charges
item.description: A former Austrian intelligence officer was convicted of spying for Russia, reviving concerns that Austria remains a hotspot for Russian espionage activity in Europe.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 Iran live: Trump says US may need to hit Iran again as ceasefire holds
item.description: BBC's live coverage of the Iran-US conflict, with President Trump saying the US may need to strike Iran again while the fragile ceasefire continues.

item.title: 🇹🇼 Taiwan reports increased Chinese military pressure near its waters
item.description: The Taipei Times reports on heightened Chinese military activity near Taiwan, with vessels operating in Taiwan's contiguous zone amid ongoing regional tensions.

item.title: 🇹🇼 Taiwan monitors Chinese vessels operating in contiguous zone
item.description: Taiwan's military is tracking Chinese vessels near the island's territorial waters as Beijing continues to apply pressure on the self-governing democracy.

item.title: 🇩🇪 Germany's defense minister wants US pullout to speed up military expansion
item.description: Germany's defense minister is pushing to accelerate the expansion of the Bundeswehr to 260,000 troops, reversing 30 years of shrinking forces in response to the US military withdrawal from Europe.

item.title: 🇹🇷 Turkey's Erdogan tells Trump issues with Iran can be resolved, Ankara says
item.description: Turkish President Tayyip Erdogan told US President Donald Trump that the issues with Iran can be resolved through diplomacy, according to Turkish officials.
